name: the plagued watering hole
identity: A water source in the Quiet Weave that was previously plagued by sickness. It has been treated using an early disruption method, resulting in marked success and preventing the spread of illness to the main camp.
current_status: Successfully treated with the early disruption method; small-scale cultivation patterns have been adapted to the drier land to supplement hunting and prevent starvation.

volatile_state.current_activity: supporting local cultivation and preventing disease spread

notes: Thorne is requesting more people (a dozen) to be sent here for permanent settlement and continued training.
